feed.title: SAP Community - ABAP Development
feed.subtitle: ABAP Development Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: "Update is terminated"PM_ORDER_PRINT_CONTROL
entry.content: In Quality system i am able to take print, but in Production throwing dump "SAPLCODB" NOT_FOUND"  update termination error.

entry.title: Missing field in Partners Tab in VA01
entry.content:
I am encountering an issue in the Partners tab of VA01. I was trying to make a standard field show up beside the Partner Definition. 

I did try to uncheck the Ctry/Reg and Tel no. columns but nothing happens

entry.title: bapi_po_create1 error
entry.content:
hi experts,

please help to solve error while creating bapi_po_create1

code :


TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_DATA,
         bsart TYPE ESART,
         bukrs TYPE BUKRS,
         ekorg TYPE EKORG,
         ekgrp TYPE BKGRP,
         lifnr TYPE LIFNR,
         matnr TYPE MATNR,
         werks TYPE EWERK,
         lgort TYPE LGORT_D,
         menge TYPE BSTMG,
         netpr TYPE BPREI,
         eindt TYPE EINDT,
         waers TYPE WAERS,
       END OF ty_DATA.


DATA : IT_DATA TYPE TABLE OF TY_DATA,
       WA_DATA TYPE TY_DATA.

data : wa_POHEADER  type  BAPIMEPOHEADER,
wa_POHEADERX  type  BAPIMEPOHEADERX,
it_RETURN  type table of  BAPIRET2,
wa_RETURN type  BAPIRET2,
it_POITEM  type table of  BAPIMEPOITEM,
wa_POITEM type BAPIMEPOITEM,
it_POITEMX  type table of BAPIMEPOITEMX,
wa_POITEMX type BAPIMEPOITEMX,
it_POSCHEDULE  type table of  BAPIMEPOSCHEDULE,
wa_POSCHEDULE type  BAPIMEPOSCHEDULE,
it_POSCHEDULEX  type table of BAPIMEPOSCHEDULX,
wa_POSCHEDULEX  type  BAPIMEPOSCHEDULX,
lv_EXPPURCHASEORDER type  BAPIMEPOHEADER-PO_NUMBER.


DATA : IT_FILE TYPE STRING.


PARAMETERS  P_FILE TYPE LOCALFILE.

AT SELECTION-SCREEN ON VALUE-REQUEST FOR P_FILE.

  CALL FUNCTION 'F4_FILENAME'
    EXPORTING
      PROGRAM_NAME  = SYST-CPROG
      DYNPRO_NUMBER = SYST-DYNNR
      FIELD_NAME    = ' '
    IMPORTING
      FILE_NAME     = P_FILE.
  .

START-OF-SELECTION.

  IT_FILE  = P_FILE.

  CALL FUNCTION 'GUI_UPLOAD'
    EXPORTING
      FILENAME                = IT_FILE
*     FILETYPE                = 'ASC'
      HAS_FIELD_SEPARATOR     = 'X'
*     HEADER_LENGTH           = 0
*     READ_BY_LINE            = 'X'
*     DAT_MODE                = ' '
*     CODEPAGE                = ' '
*     IGNORE_CERR             = ABAP_TRUE
*     REPLACEMENT             = '#'
*     CHECK_BOM               = ' '
*     VIRUS_SCAN_PROFILE      =
*     NO_AUTH_CHECK           = ' '
* IMPORTING
*     FILELENGTH              =
*     HEADER                  =
    TABLES
      DATA_TAB                = IT_DATA
* CHANGING
*     ISSCANPERFORMED         = ' '
    EXCEPTIONS
      FILE_OPEN_ERROR         = 1
      FILE_READ_ERROR         = 2
      NO_BATCH                = 3
      GUI_REFUSE_FILETRANSFER = 4
      INVALID_TYPE            = 5
      NO_AUTHORITY            = 6
      UNKNOWN_ERROR           = 7
      BAD_DATA_FORMAT         = 8
      HEADER_NOT_ALLOWED      = 9
      SEPARATOR_NOT_ALLOWED   = 10
      HEADER_TOO_LONG         = 11
      UNKNOWN_DP_ERROR        = 12
      ACCESS_DENIED           = 13
      DP_OUT_OF_MEMORY        = 14
      DISK_FULL               = 15
      DP_TIMEOUT              = 16
      OTHERS                  = 17.
  IF SY-SUBRC <> 0.
* Implement suitable error handling here
  ENDIF.

  LOOP AT it_data INTO wa_data.


    REFRESH: it_poitem, it_poitemx, it_poschedule, it_poschedulex, it_return.
    CLEAR: wa_poheader, wa_poheaderx, lv_exppurchaseorder.


    "HEADER

wa_POHEADER-DOC_TYPE = WA_DATA-BSART.
wa_POHEADER-COMP_CODE = wa_data-bukrs.
wa_POHEADER-PURCH_ORG = WA_DATA-EKORG.
wa_POHEADER-PUR_GROUP = WA_DATA-EKGRP.
wa_POHEADER-VENDOR = WA_DATA-LIFNR.
wa_POHEADER-CURRENCY = WA_DATA-WAERS.

wa_POHEADERX-DOC_TYPE = 'X'.
wa_POHEADERX-COMP_CODE = 'X'.
wa_POHEADERX-PURCH_ORG = 'X'.
wa_POHEADERX-PUR_GROUP = 'X'.
wa_POHEADERX-VENDOR = 'X'.
wa_POHEADERX-CURRENCY = 'X'.

"ITEM


wa_POITEM-MATERIAL = WA_DATA-MATNR.
wa_POITEM-PLANT = WA_DATA-WERKS.
wa_POITEM-STGE_LOC = WA_DATA-LGORT.
wa_POITEM-QUANTITY = WA_DATA-MENGE.
wa_POITEM-NET_PRICE = WA_DATA-NETPR.

APPEND wa_poitem TO it_poitem.


wa_POITEMX-MATERIAL = 'X'.
wa_POITEMX-PLANT = 'X'.
wa_POITEMX-STGE_LOC = 'X'.
wa_POITEMX-QUANTITY = 'X'.
wa_POITEMX-NET_PRICE = 'X'.

APPEND wa_poitemX TO it_poitemX.

" SCHEDULE

wa_POSCHEDULE-DELIVERY_DATE = WA_DATA-EINDT.

APPEND wa_POSCHEDULE TO IT_POSCHEDULE.

.
wa_POSCHEDULEX-DELIVERY_DATE = 'X'.

APPEND wa_POSCHEDULEX TO IT_POSCHEDULEX.


CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_PO_CREATE1'
  EXPORTING
    POHEADER                     = wa_POHEADER
   POHEADERX                    = wa_POHEADERX
*   POADDRVENDOR                 =
*   TESTRUN                      =
*   MEMORY_UNCOMPLETE            =
*   MEMORY_COMPLETE              =
*   POEXPIMPHEADER               =
*   POEXPIMPHEADERX              =
*   VERSIONS                     =
*   NO_MESSAGING                 =
*   NO_MESSAGE_REQ               =
*   NO_AUTHORITY                 =
*   NO_PRICE_FROM_PO             =
*   PARK_COMPLETE                =
*   PARK_UNCOMPLETE              =
 IMPORTING
   EXPPURCHASEORDER             = lv_EXPPURCHASEORDER
*   EXPHEADER                    =
*   EXPPOEXPIMPHEADER            =
 TABLES
   RETURN                       = it_RETURN
   POITEM                       = it_POITEM
   POITEMX                      = it_POITEMX
*   POADDRDELIVERY               =
   POSCHEDULE                   = it_POSCHEDULE
   POSCHEDULEX                  = it_POSCHEDULEX
*   POACCOUNT                    =
*   POACCOUNTPROFITSEGMENT       =
*   POACCOUNTX                   =
*   POCONDHEADER                 =
*   POCONDHEADERX                =
*   POCOND                       =
*   POCONDX                      =
*   POLIMITS                     =
*   POCONTRACTLIMITS             =
*   POSERVICES                   =
*   POSRVACCESSVALUES            =
*   POSERVICESTEXT               =
*   EXTENSIONIN                  =
*   EXTENSIONOUT                 =
*   POEXPIMPITEM                 =
*   POEXPIMPITEMX                =
*   POTEXTHEADER                 =
*   POTEXTITEM                   =
*   ALLVERSIONS                  =
*   POPARTNER                    =
*   POCOMPONENTS                 =
*   POCOMPONENTSX                =
*   POSHIPPING                   =
*   POSHIPPINGX                  =
*   POSHIPPINGEXP                =
*   SERIALNUMBER                 =
*   SERIALNUMBERX                =
*   INVPLANHEADER                =
*   INVPLANHEADERX               =
*   INVPLANITEM                  =
*   INVPLANITEMX                 =
          .

READ TABLE it_return INTO wa_return WITH KEY type = 'E'.
  IF sy-subrc = 0.
    WRITE: / 'Error for Vendor:', wa_data-lifnr.
    LOOP AT it_return INTO wa_return.
      WRITE: / wa_return-type, wa_return-message.
    ENDLOOP.
  ELSE.
    CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT'
      EXPORTING
        wait = 'X'.

    WRITE: / 'PO Created Successfully:',lv_EXPPURCHASEORDER.
  ENDIF.

ENDLOOP.

error :

thankyou.

entry.title: EWM - Modifying custom fields in HU header using fm /SCWM/HUHDR_ATTR_CHANGE sometimes does not work
entry.content:
Hi, EWM/ABAP experts.

Good day! 
Need your help for some technical query please.
I need to understand how function module /SCWM/HUHDR_ATTR_CHANGE works.

I need to update an HU during Goods Receipt of an Inbound Delivery via Warehouse Monitor (/SCWM/MON) in an EWM system. The BADI we found for this is /SCWM/IF_EX_DLV_GM_PROCESS, method CHECK_DOCUMENT. We've tested it and it works, we are able to persist data in our custom fields in HU header table.

Now the problem is sometimes it does not work.
In this particular instance, I was trying to post GR to update an HU like normal, but even though we're getting the values correctly, the database is not getting updated at all.


I have a theory that Update Task is the culprit, but I am not very familiar with the Update Task feature of ABAP.  This is because when I enabled Update debugging, a debugger session popped out saying that the changes in the FM might be overwritten.

So my main questions are:

  1. How does fm /SCWM/HUHDR_ATTR_CHANGE work? Does it change the HU tables directly, or it's just putting the changes in a buffer?
  2. Can another process like Update Task override changes in HU header maintenance during the same runtime, even without errors?

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Purchase Contract Create SOAP API- PurchasingContractERPRequest_In_V1 ( item category D)
entry.content:
I am using the SOAP API for Purchase contract to create Service Purchase Contract but getting the error as : "Maintain Services or LImits".Not able to find what all the fields we can pass in order to create purchase contract?

Could anyone please share me the sample payload for this SOAP API.Please find the payload which we are using:

<n0:PurchasingContractERPRequest_V1 xmlns:n0="http://sap.com/xi/SAPGlobal20/Global">
<MessageHeader>
<CreationDateTime>2026-03-21T12:00:00.0000000Z</CreationDateTime>
</MessageHeader>
<PurchasingContract actionCode="01" itemListCompleteTransmissionIndicator="true">
<CompanyID>0100</CompanyID>
<ProcessingTypeCode>WK</ProcessingTypeCode>
<ValidityPeriod>
<StartDate>2026-03-19</StartDate>
<EndDate>2026-06-03</EndDate>
</ValidityPeriod>
<ExchangeRate>
<ExchangeRate>
<UnitCurrency>USD</UnitCurrency>
<QuotedCurrency>USD</QuotedCurrency>
<Rate>1.00000</Rate>
</ExchangeRate>
<ExchangeRateFixedIndicator></ExchangeRateFixedIndicator>
</ExchangeRate>
<TargetAmount currencyCode="USD">999999999.00</TargetAmount>
<SellerParty>
<InternalID>0004100000</InternalID>
</SellerParty>
<ResponsiblePurchasingOrganisationParty>
<InternalID>0001</InternalID>
</ResponsiblePurchasingOrganisationParty>
<ResponsiblePurchasingGroupParty>
<InternalID>001</InternalID>
</ResponsiblePurchasingGroupParty>

<!-- ====== ITEM 10 — Consulting ====== -->
<Item actionCode="01">
<ID>00010</ID>
<TypeCode>01</TypeCode>
 <ProcessingTypeCode>9</ProcessingTypeCode>
<CancelledIndicator>false</CancelledIndicator>
<BlockedIndicator>false</BlockedIndicator>
<TargetQuantity unitCode="C62">1</TargetQuantity>
<ProductCategory>
<InternalID>01</InternalID>
</ProductCategory>
   <ServiceItemSpecificDetails>
      <AlternateAllowedIndicator>true</AlternateAllowedIndicator>
      <ByBidderProvidedIndicator>true</ByBidderProvidedIndicator>
      <PriceChangeAllowedIndicator>true</PriceChangeAllowedIndicator>
   </ServiceItemSpecificDetails>
<PriceSpecificationElement actionCode="01">
<TypeCode>PB00</TypeCode>
<Rate>
<DecimalValue>200.00</DecimalValue>
<MeasureUnitCode>C62</MeasureUnitCode>
<CurrencyCode>USD</CurrencyCode>
<BaseDecimalValue>1</BaseDecimalValue>
<BaseMeasureUnitCode>C62</BaseMeasureUnitCode>
</Rate>
</PriceSpecificationElement>
<DeliveryTerms>
<QuantityTolerance>
<OverPercentUnlimitedIndicator>true</OverPercentUnlimitedIndicator>
</QuantityTolerance>
</DeliveryTerms>
<Description languageCode="EN">Consulting</Description>
<AccountingCodingBlockDistribution>
<AccountingCodingBlockAssignment>
<AccountingCodingBlockTypeCode>U</AccountingCodingBlockTypeCode>
</AccountingCodingBlockAssignment>
</AccountingCodingBlockDistribution>
<FollowUpGoodsReceiptRequest>
<RequirementCode>1</RequirementCode>
</FollowUpGoodsReceiptRequest>
<FollowUpInvoiceRequest>
<RequirementCode>1</RequirementCode>
</FollowUpInvoiceRequest>
</Item>
</PurchasingContract>
</n0:PurchasingContractERPRequest_V1>

entry.title: Transfer standard field from erp delivery to ewm delivery
entry.content:
Hi all,

I have a requirement to transfer the Unloading Point (ABLAD) from ERP to EWM for outbound deliveries.

  • Source: RESB-ABLAD
  • In ERP delivery, the field is available at header level (LIKP-ABLAD), but not found at item level (LIPS)
  • Requirement: make this information available per item in EWM
  • working on s/4 Hana 2023

Current approach:

  • Extension via EEW (item level)
  • Mapping via BAdI /SCWM/EX_ERP_MAPIN_OD_SAVEREPL (MAPIN)

Questions:

  • Is this the correct BAdI for this scenario in embedded EWM?
  • How would you handle the mapping per item, given that ABLAD is not available in LIPS?
  • Do we need an ERP enhancement to pass it at item level?

thanks for support

entry.title: Need to decrypt RSA - ECB - PKCS1 Padding in S4 HANA 2022 using our private key
entry.content:
Hello,

For bank integration i have to decrypt RSA - ECB - PKCS1 Padding using our private key in S4 HANA 2022 without BTP, where SSF_KRN_DECRYPT is not available

entry.title: S/4HANA 2025におけるALV更新（REFRESH_TABLE_DISPLAY）実行時のエラーについて
entry.content:
S/4HANA 2025環境にて、ALVのデータ更新処理を行う際にエラーが発生しております。
つきましては、以下の2点の実装方式における原因と解決策をご教示ください。
関数型ALV（REUSE_ALV_GRID_DISPLAY）
オブジェクト指向型ALV（CL_GUI_ALV_GRID）

entry.title: i want to create sales orders by using bapi using upload file
entry.content:
Hi experts,

i want to create sales order using upload file using bapi 

give me sample code

please help me out

thankyou.

entry.title: Restrict Plant in MB51 Report
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Requirement (Corrected Version)
We need to restrict plant selection in the SAP MB51 report.

  • The Plant field must be mandatory.
  • Users should be allowed to enter a maximum of 5 plants only.
  • If more than 5 plants are entered, the system should display an error message and prevent execution of the report.

Advance Thanks.

entry.title: MIRO Header Enhancement with custom fields
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a requirement to Add 3 custom fields under BASIC DATA Tab and 2 fields under PAYMENTS Tab in MIRO transaction. Need clarification and steps to achieve the same. In some Blog posts it was mentioned Like EXITS are best way and some others mentioned  Badi . Could you please provide me the Available EXIT or BADI to achieve the same with steps.

entry.title: Parallel landscape using the separate client
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

we are planning to setup and parallel landscape for project line. usually companies use separate system for parallel project line.

can we use new client in same development system for project purpose.  below in the diagram is the approach I am thinking of.

due to budget constrain we can not have more systems. 

what are the risks of cross client object conflicts.  we are on S/4 hana 2023 private cloud edition (RISE).

are there other risks and limitation also?

Your inputs are appreciated.

Regards

entry.title: Calculation Taxes for Brazil Scenario
entry.content:
Hello everyone!

I'm developing an Adobe Form for Purchase Orders in an S/4HANA environment, and due to Brazilian legal requirements, we need to display tax information for each material line item in the printed form.

In the S/4HANA version I'm working with, tax data is not persisted in the PRCD_ELEMENTS table — it appears that tax calculation is triggered on-the-fly rather than stored. To replicate this behavior in my print program, I've been using the following function modules:

- J_1B_SAVE_TAX_FIELDS
- J_1B_SET_TAX_CALLER
- CALCULATE_TAX_ITEM

This approach works functionally, but when I run the ATC (ABAP Test Cockpit), I receive Priority 2 warnings for these function modules, which indicates they are not Clean Core compliant.

My question is: for Brazilian tax calculation in S/4HANA, is there a Clean Core compliant alternative to retrieve or recalculate tax data at print time — such as a released API, a BAdI, or an OData service — that would avoid these ATC violations?

Any guidance or pointers to official SAP documentation would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: Issue While Editing Custom Structure – Error in SAP Dictionary (SE11)
entry.content:
When trying to change or edit the custom structure ZMDI01_01 in SE11, the system throws an error message and prevents further editing.

https://capgemini-my.sharepoint.com/:w:/p/priyanka-vinayak_nagthane/IQDy2JK1HLaFQI-wBbs4E0ohAV7NQGHtDXNFXqpcvwexnws?e=otDhZY

The structure opens in Display mode, but upon attempting to edit or change attributes/components, the following error message is displayed:

“You cannot edit object R3TR TABL ZMDI01_01 with the standard editor.Choose ‘Display object’ or ‘Cancel’.”

Due to this error, changes to the structure cannot be performed.

entry.title: Issue While Editing Custom Structure – Error in SAP Dictionary (SE11)
entry.content:
When trying to change or edit the custom structure ZMDI01_01 in SE11, the system throws an error message and prevents further editing.

The structure opens in Display mode, but upon attempting to edit or change attributes/components, the following error message is displayed:

“You cannot edit object R3TR TABL ZMDI01_01 with the standard editor.Choose ‘Display object’ or ‘Cancel’.”

Due to this error, changes to the structure cannot be performed.

STRCUTURE NAMES ARE

ZMDI01_01

 ZVEXO07_01

ZVDB00_NALI

entry.title: Is class_constructor a good method to place the buffer in?
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

 

As the subject suggests. I'm trying to understand what the best method is for placing the buffer.

I know that Class_constructor can't be used with a WHERE clause; therefore, the buffer must read the whole table. I'm not sure if this is suitable for some cases or not, based on the size of the table. I would love a clear explanation of this topic.

SAP S/4HANA Cloud ABAP Environment

entry.title: Generate ABAP Repository Objects not shown
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

Generate ABAP Repository Objects not shown in my system. Our eclipse version is Version: 2022-06 (4.24.0). Why Generate ABAP Repository Objects not shown?

 

Advance Thanks

entry.title: Invited user does not have access to SAP Appliance
entry.content:
Hi there!

I have created an SAP ABAP Platform 2023 developer edition on SAP HANA Appliance and it works correctly.

Then I invited another user. He clicked the invitation link, logged in and could see the appliance.

After logging out and in again he is not able to see the appliance anymore... 😑

It is only possible to see the appliance when he again uses the invitation link. There is an error message that the invitation does not exist or is expired. After that he can see the appliance again. 

What kind of glitch is this?!

Thanks for any hints!

Enno

/edit: I have used my personal SAP-User (P12345) and I can see the appliance correctly. It seems to be only the other P-user for which this does not work.

entry.title: Objects link creation/attach in projects app
entry.content:
Hi experts,
In the Projects app, we have implemented a custom tab in that based “Save” action. Currently, when the save action is triggered, a DIR (Document Info Record) document is successfully created and its was showing in the CV03N with attached file.

However, our requirement is to automatically link (or create and assign) this DIR document directly within the “Object Links” tab of the respective project.

Could you please guide us on how to achieve this functionality? Specifically:

  • How can the DIR be programmatically linked to the project object upon creation?
  • Are there any standard APIs, BAPIs, or enhancement options available for this scenario?

Any guidance or references would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Auto-Link DIR(Document info record) in Projects App Object Links tab.
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In the Projects app, I have added a custom tab to the DIR (Document Info Record) creation logic with a Save action. Currently, the document is being created successfully and is also getting updated in CV02N/CV03N with the file.

Now, we have an requirement: when the Save action is triggered from the custom tab, the same document should also be updated in the Object Links tab within the Projects app.

Is there a way to attach or link the document to the project using a Function Module (FM) or BAPI?

I would appreciate suggestions or best practices on how to achieve this.

Thanks in advance for your support!
